applicability_notes: torch_pattern_source: test: pt_out = torch.transpose(in0, -3, -2).reshape([B, 1, seq_len, num_heads * head_dim]); constraints: ['input must be 4D [B, num_heads, seq_len, head_dim] in TILE_LAYOUT', 'no-op shortcut commonly guarded by num_heads > 1 at call sites', 'decode-mode call sites transpose(1,2) first so heads land on dim -3 before concat']

placement_observations.size_descriptor: [1, num_heads, seq_len, head_dim] -> [1, 1, seq_len, hidden]; prefill, seq_len up to thousands (followed by reshape if seq_len > 1024 / MAX_MM_SEQ_LEN)
placement_observations.source: model call sites: attn_output_11SH = ttnn.experimental.nlp_concat_heads(attn_output_1QSD, memory_config=ttnn.DRAM_MEMORY_CONFIG) followed by ttnn.reshape when seq_len > 1024

placement_observations.size_descriptor: small activation (decode or short-seq SDPA output) feeding ttnn.linear out-projection
placement_observations.source: model call sites: hidden_states = ttnn.experimental.nlp_concat_heads(hidden_states, memory_config=ttnn.L1_MEMORY_CONFIG); also ttnn.MemoryConfig(INTERLEAVED, BufferType.L1)

placement_observations.size_descriptor: vision/encoder context_layer kept on-chip for next block-sharded matmul

memory_config.shard_spec_template: L1_BLOCK_SHARDED_MEMORY_CONFIG (default block shard over core grid)

placement_observations.size_descriptor: decode attention output [B, num_heads, 32(padded batch/seq), head_dim], one head per core

memory_config.shard_spec_template: height-shard across {NUM_HEADS} cores, shard shape [{SEQ_LEN_PER_CORE}, {HEAD_DIM}], orientation COL_MAJOR

placement_observations.source: model call site comment: 'Height-shard attn_out across num_heads cores (1 head/core) so nlp_concat_heads runs sharded instead of single-core (20->~1.5 us)'; test: TensorMemoryLayout.HEIGHT_SHARDED, ShardOrientation.COL_MAJOR

placement_observations.size_descriptor: decode, sharded concat output later resharded into wo/o_proj width-sharded in0 layout

memory_config.shard_spec_template: concat_out_memcfg / _cp_concat_out_memcfg: sharded output matching downstream sharded matmul reshard

placement_observations.source: model call site: attn_concat_sharded = ttnn.experimental.nlp_concat_heads(attn_sharded, memory_config=concat_out_memcfg); else branch falls back to ttnn.L1_MEMORY_CONFIG
